coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 296-group, 2,413-node closure, including its six-object pipe structure collection.
validation: The authored six-way pipe layout, generated sleeves, SDF joint shell, dual-mesh smoothing, and structure toggle run in-browser. Native manifold surface nets improve the authored result from 20,190 / 18,098 to 11,826 / 8,538 versus Blender's 11,163 / 8,064, reducing the vertex delta to 5.94% and smoothing the central junction. Bone-preview topology remains within 1.06% of Blender; the smaller-joint and hidden-structure cases remain 10.70-20.08% denser, and the portable Node sweep still carries the documented collection-coordinate bounds offset.
